hypertrophy.reasoning: Address upper back and arm balance; these muscles are minimally taxed by the metcon.

raw_text:
Partner WOD | Score Time
PARTNER WORKOUT for time
Part A
IGYG then run together x 4 rounds
10 wall balls
5 power snatch @50/35
5 muscle ups or 5 pull ups & 5 dips
200m recovery run together
Rest 2 mins
Part B
50 DB snatches
50 box overs
50 Overhead squat @50/35
50 T2B
500m run
Slow is fast
If the run feels hard, you went too hard inside
Scale pull ups to ring rows
T2B → K2E
Scale dips to push ups
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: part A time. Workout: part A time. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, biceps, calves.
